title: rebutia heliosa subsp. cajasensis
intro: Rebutia heliosa subsp. cajasensis is a rare and endemic cactus species native to Ecuador. It is known for its unique and striking appearance, featuring vibrant yellow flowers and a robust, thick stem. The plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may provide relief from various health issues, such as skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Rebutia heliosa subsp. cajasensis can be made by infusing the plant's stems and flowers in water, creating a topical treatment for skin conditions and a possible remedy for digestive issues.
